signals.signal_title: Cash Improvement Plan $800M achieved; IT contracts cut
signals.signal_description: Cash Improvement Plan targeting $500M run-rate savings, expanded to $600M for 2025, $800M achieved. Fixed cost reductions include IT contract changes and headcount. Capex cut to $1.2B for 2026. Cumulative $1.3B target by end 2026.

signals.signal_title: Director Infrastructure Services Kaushik Majumder hired
signals.signal_description: Kaushik Majumder hired as Director Infrastructure Services from hubergroup, leading 60+ person team based in India. Prior experience at BASF, Linde, Accenture. Highest visible IT leadership hire in recent LYB history.

enrichment_notes: Global petrochemical leader — polyolefins, chemicals, refining and technology licensing. Incorporated Netherlands, operational HQ Houston TX (STOLA, no channel mismatch). FY2025 revenue ~$37.7B, EBITDA excl. identified items $2.5B. ~26,000 employees. No standalone CIO identified publicly. Director-level Infrastructure Services hire Kaushik Majumder (May 2025, from hubergroup) leads 60+ person team in India. Cash Improvement Plan: $800M achieved 2025, $1.3B cumulative target by end 2026 — IT contract changes and headcount reductions included. Capex reduced to $1.2B 2026. No MSP confirmed. No OEM direct. No M365 evidence. ms_standardized=false. ai_maturity=4 — no CIO-level digital transformation signals, infrastructure director only. WWT angle: infrastructure consolidation, managed services opportunity during cost reduction cycle, OT modernization at Channelview TX and La Porte TX facilities.
